title: Crispy Garlic French Tagine
description: This adventurous low-carb-friendly dish features garlic, turmeric, and a tandoor-inspired twist, with its crunchy texture making it an excellent side or main course.
instructions: Season the chicken with turmeric, salt, and pepper on both sides.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides (about 5 minutes per side). Remove from heat.
In the same pan, add sliced onions to the reserved cooking fat. Cook until translucent (about 3-4 minutes), stirring occasionally.
Return the chicken to the skillet along with minced garlic. Stir well to coat the pieces evenly with the onion mixture and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the dish to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Top with fresh ground black pepper on top of each piece of chicken.
Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes or until the juices run clear when cut into. Serve hot as a main course.
